code:
import io
import string

let line = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

mut d = 0
while d < 10
  let target = 48 + d
  mut count = 0
  mut i = 0
  let n = string.len(line)
  while i < n
    match string.byte_at(line, i)
    when Some(b)
      if b == target
        count = count + 1
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  mut hashes = ""
  mut k = 0
  while k < count
    hashes = "#{hashes}#"
    k = k + 1
  end
  println("#{d}: #{hashes}")
  d = d + 1
end
